name: Pro Rank Tracker
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Pro Rank Tracker Does

Pro Rank Tracker is a Google Maps rank checker built for SEOs, agencies, and businesses that need detailed ranking insights. It tracks local, mobile, and global search rankings with daily updates. The platform is packed with features but can be overwhelming for beginners. Best for data-driven marketers.

Source: Pro Rank Tracker

Key Features

  • Tracks your Google Maps rank daily across desktop and mobile, right down to zip codes or neighborhoods.
  • See full SERPs for any term, including local packs, videos, snippets, and map results.
  • Share white-label reports with clients or let them check rankings through a branded portal with MyRanks.

Benefits of Pro Rank Tracker

  • Tracks rankings across maps rank checker results
  • Provides detailed reports for clients and teams
  • Allows bulk tracking for large SEO campaigns

Pricing

  • Starter: From $49/month (500-1,000 terms)
  • Pro: From $109/month (1,500-2,500 terms)
  • Agency: From $180/month (3,000+ terms, API access)

Pros

  • Highly detailed rank tracking
  • Supports unlimited URLs and reports
  • API access for automation

Cons

  • Learning curve for beginners
  • Higher pricing for agencies

‍
